name: image_load_dll_amsi_uncommon_process
raw_query: any where file.path:"*\\amsi.dll" and (not ((process.executable like~ ("*:\\Windows\\explorer.exe", "*:\\Windows\\Sysmon64.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "*:\\Program Files\\*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "*:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*")) or ((process.executable like~ ("*:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework64\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm64\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\ngentask.exe") or (?process.executable == null) or process.executable=="")) and (not (process.executable:"*:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Platform\\*" and process.executable:"*\\MsMpEng.exe"))
